title: majana glandulosa
intro: Majana glandulosa, also known as Majana or Desert Marigold, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern regions of North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Majana glandulosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Majana glandulosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
